# Retrospective System for Claude Code

A Claude Code command and skill suite for extracting maximum value from completed AI agent conversations — identifying mistakes, decisions, discoveries, recoveries, and reusable patterns, then persisting them as structured knowledge assets.

## What it solves

After finishing an important task in Claude Code, the conversation contains valuable lessons that are lost when the session ends. `/复盘` (retrospective) scans the entire conversation, applies domain-specific analysis lenses, cross-references existing knowledge, and writes structured memory files.

## Key features

- 7-domain coverage: experiment, data, coding, research, debugging, design, custom
- Balanced anchoring: equal weight on problem identification and positive pattern capture
- Solidified pattern lifecycle: incubation → validation → upgrade to daily rules
- 12 preset degradation paths with general degradation rule for unknown exceptions
- Closed-loop verification: tracks whether retro outputs are actually used in subsequent conversations
- Domain skill auto-generation: when a new domain is encountered, searches industry best practices → structures → adversarial review → user confirmation → saves as skill

## Architecture

```
/复盘 command (lightweight entry)
  → Scan conversation (6 types of notable moments)
  → Identify domains (7 domains + custom)
  → Per-domain deep analysis (retro-<domain> skills)
  → Cross-reference existing knowledge (7 relationship types)
  → Persist findings (Rule/Lesson/Insight/Pattern/Action routing)
  → Report + closed-loop verification
```

## Design principles

- Quality-first: skills are polished once, benefit compound over time
- Balanced anchoring: equal focus on problems AND reusable good practices
- Industry experience over self-归纳: search before assuming
- Both入库 (new knowledge) and 盘点 (maintaining existing knowledge)
- Adversarial review built into every new skill creation
- Gradual growth: domain skills accumulate through use

## Files

- `.claude/commands/复盘.md` — Main command
- `.claude/skills/retro-experiment/SKILL.md` — ML experiment lens
- `.claude/skills/retro-data/SKILL.md` — Data processing lens
- `.claude/skills/retro-coding/SKILL.md` — Code quality lens
- `.claude/skills/retro-research/SKILL.md` — Research lens
- `.claude/skills/retro-debugging/SKILL.md` — Debugging lens
- `.claude/skills/retro-design/SKILL.md` — Architecture/design lens
- `docs/design.md` — Full design documentation
